description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Tests that runs on a workflow dispatch. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: testlib-very-long-tests, gpu-tests, dramsys-tests, and weekly-tests. The testlib-very-long-tests job runs very-long tests in a self-hosted Linux environment with a matrix of test types, caching build/ALL, and uploading results. The gpu-tests and dramsys-tests jobs run GPU tests and DRAMSys tests, respectively, in self-hosted Linux environments with specific containers and caching. The weekly-tests job is a dummy job that indicates whether the weekly tests have passed or not.
